recommendedPlatform: AWS Secrets Manager, GCP Secret Manager, Azure Key Vault, or Doppler
rotationPolicy: JWT secrets quarterly; payment/webhook secrets on provider rotation; document every change in change log

groups.name: Authentication
groups.description: Signing keys — rotate with dual-key window and forced re-login if needed.

secrets.notes: Access token signing key, min 32 chars

groups.name: Data stores
groups.description: Connection strings — separate per environment (prod vs staging).

secrets.notes: Atlas cluster URI with scoped DB user
Required for multi-instance prod (sessions, rate limits, jobs)

groups.name: Third-party APIs
groups.description: Vendor keys — server-only, never in mobile bundle.

groups.name: Payments
groups.description: Razorpay — use test keys on staging only.

secrets.notes: Public key id (still store in secret manager for deploy consistency)

groups.name: Streaming
groups.description: LiveKit credentials when live classes are enabled.

exportChecklist: Enable secret manager versioning on all production secrets
Export a JSON snapshot to encrypted offline storage quarterly (break-glass)
Store Atlas database user password separately from MONGODB_URI backup
Document who can read/write secrets (IAM policy review)
Never commit .env, backup archives, or secret exports to git
After rotation, update staging first and run smoke tests before prod
